name: Turkey Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti on the stove in boiling water.
2. Cook bacon on a rack in the microwave on high for 6-7 minutes, covered. Crumble and set aside.
3. Add butter to a dish with mushrooms and onions. Cook on High for 4-5 minutes, stirring once.
4. Stir in flour and pepper. Cook at high for 30 seconds.
5. Add broth and cream, mix well, and cook on High for 9-10 minutes, stirring every 2 minutes.
6. If desired, add sherry (1 tablespoon).
7. Stir in cooked spaghetti, chicken, bacon, and Parmesan cheese. Mix well.
8. Cover and cook at high for 13-15 minutes, stirring once.
9. Garnish with parsley.
Serves 6-8. Great for using leftover turkey after Christmas or Thanksgiving.
